Finding.Description: High-Level requirement HL-EXPL-1.2 is not refined by any Low-Level Requirement in the provided LL document. This breaks traceability and refinement coverage across the hierarchy.
Finding.Solution: Add a Low-Level Requirement LL-EXPL-1.4 that refines HL-EXPL-1.2 and depends on LL-EXPL-1.2. Example: LL-EXPL-1.4 Wall detection reliability and integration; Content: "Robot shall reliably detect walls under varying sensor noise conditions and integrate detections into the occupancy map."

Finding.Description: Typo in High-Level Requirement name HL-MAP-2.2: "Cell Clasification". The correct spelling is "Cell Classification".
Finding.Solution: Correct the HL name to "Cell Classification" and ensure all references to this requirement use the corrected spelling to maintain consistency.

Finding.Description: There is no explicit Low-Level Requirement for Localization/Pose Estimation to support exploration and mapping as described by HL-EXPL-1.1 and its usage by mapping/planning components.
Finding.Solution: Add LL-LOC-7.1 Localization and Pose Estimation refining HL-EXPL-1.1; Content: "Robot shall estimate its pose in the environment using sensor fusion and provide pose with uncertainty; Pose updates shall be integrated into the map and planning modules."
